products.name: Realtime Translator
products.tagline: AI-powered real-time speech translation for meetings and conferences
products.description: Break language barriers in real-time. LingoFlow's Realtime Translator captures speech, transcribes it instantly, and delivers translations in your target language — all within your browser. No installation required.

features.title: Real-time Speech Recognition
features.description: Powered by OpenAI's latest models with automatic language detection across Japanese, English, and Chinese.

features.title: Instant Translation
features.description: See translations appear as words are spoken. Perfect for live meetings, presentations, and international conferences.

features.title: Session History & Export
features.description: Review past sessions with full transcript and translation logs. Export as text or audio files.

features.title: Custom Dictionary
features.description: Upload specialized terminology via CSV. Ensure industry jargon and proper nouns are translated accurately.

features.title: Works Everywhere
features.description: Progressive Web App that runs in any modern browser. Install on mobile or desktop for app-like experience.

products.name: Meeting Translation
products.tagline: 対面の海外商談で、スマホ1台でリアルタイム翻訳。認識ズレゼロの合意形成を実現
products.description: 日英・日中の対面商談をリアルタイム翻訳でサポート。翻訳ログで合意内容を可視化し、「言った・言わない」をなくします。
